_publications._publicationTitle: Proof of Concept for Genome Profiling of the Neurofibroma/Sarcoma Sequence in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: we performed WES on DNA samples extracted from benign tissue (selected by the pathologist from the plexiform neurofibroma sample), primary tumor sample diagnosed as MPNST
resourceName: Agilent Sure Select XT HS2 all exon v8 kit
details: Successfully performed exome capture for whole exome sequencing of FFPE-derived DNA samples from MPNST patient tissues
